items.name_cn:
Large [Exclusive Photo M40990 Large M40990]
🎀🎀Classic Tote💋💋Louis Vuitton New Neverfull Reinterprets the Classic Handbag, exploring exquisite details inside. The redesigned interior features fresh fabric lining and vintage details inspired by the Louis Vuitton archives. The most notable feature is the detachable zip pouch, which can be used alone as an elegant clutch or as an extra pocket. The bright lining tone adds more liveliness to the Monogram classic canvas.
Medium Size: (32*29*17)
Large Size: (40*33*20)

items.name_en: Large size 41-34-19cm. ONTHEGO Monogram shoulder bag. A perennial bestseller with options for black leather or Monogram shoulder straps. The large size is indeed quite big; it is recommended for taller girls. The large Monogram logo looks very youthful and stylish.

items.name_en: Large Size 41×34×19cm New Pure Black This ONTHEGO has been hard to buy since its release and is my No. 1! Attention to those who want a large bag! The latest full-leather series, cool and steady black, practical, classic, versatile, and spacious. The super durable leather + large capacity means it is not limited by seasons or travel! Unbeatable price + authentic channel quality. Buy it now!!

items.name_cn:
LOCY BB Series 🅼44141 Uninspected Version #
❐ Size: 20*16*7.5cm ❐
A classic vintage series that is impossible to resist at first glance. This Locy BB is a reimagined version of the classic One Handle. As a perennial bestseller and versatile classic, it remains a "must-have" after the test of time. It maintains high sales volume and excellent resale value. With various carrying styles using the wrist strap or long shoulder strap, it is stylish and unique!
Locky BB suits every mood and occasion. Beautiful and distinctive, it is the magic king that every woman cannot resist!

items.name_en: LOOP HOBO Runway Edition #M46311# Inspection-free Version
items.name_cn:
LOOP HOBO Runway Edition #M46311# Inspection-free Version
▪️Size: 38*26*10cm▪️
The runway Loop Hobo is simply full of fashion sense,
With a crescent moon shape, it was loved at first sight on the runway.
The bag shape is lazy yet stylish, sweet and salty,
Monogram color blocking, classic yet eye-catching. With two shoulder straps,
The metal chain can be used as a retro clutch, and the leather strap can be crossbody or shoulder, offering multiple ways to style.
Great capacity, with a mother-and-child bag design, making it both stylish and practical. The winner of both looks and functionality!
